name: Fruit salad
instructions: Chop banana, apple, and orange into bite-size pieces, toss together, drizzle with honey.

name: Banana oat pancakes
instructions: Mash banana, whisk with egg and milk, fold in oats, cook spoonfuls on a hot pan until golden.

name: Apple cinnamon oatmeal
instructions: Simmer oats in milk, stir in diced apple and a pinch of cinnamon until soft and creamy.

name: Citrus glazed carrots
instructions: Simmer sliced carrots with orange juice, butter, and honey until glazed and tender.

name: Broccoli carrot stir fry
instructions: Stir fry broccoli and carrot with garlic, splash with soy sauce, serve over rice.

name: Roasted broccoli with garlic
instructions: Toss broccoli with garlic and olive oil, roast until crisp, finish with grated parmesan.

name: Classic hot dog
instructions: Grill or boil the hot dog, tuck into a bun, top with mustard and diced onion.

name: Loaded pizza night
instructions: Bake pizza according to package instructions, top with extra cheese and chili flakes.

name: Weekend donut breakfast
instructions: Warm the donut for 10 seconds, serve with fresh coffee. Not everything needs to be complicated.

name: Simple cake plate
instructions: Slice cake, top with fresh berries and a spoon of whipped cream.

name: Deli sandwich upgrade
instructions: Warm the sandwich slightly if it has cheese, serve with pickles and chips on the side.

name: Garlic butter pasta
instructions: Boil pasta, toss with melted garlic butter, finish with grated parmesan.

name: Simple egg fried rice
instructions: Scramble egg, stir in cooked rice and diced carrot, season with soy sauce.

name: Bottled sparkling refresher
instructions: Pour the bottled drink over ice, add a squeeze of orange and a few mint leaves.
